project.description:
Monthly auto-run of the UniProt primary and secondary loads against the latest processed UniProt release file (re-integrates changes that came from our own database since the release was originally loaded).
Behavior: - This job always runs UniProtLoadTask and UniprotSecondaryTermLoadTask against the most recent ALREADY-PROCESSED UniProt release (UNIPROT_RERUN_LATEST_PROCESSED=true), with changes committed. This catches up on changes from the NCBI load and other local edits since that release was loaded. - If a newer UniProt release has been downloaded by UniProt-Release-Check_d but not yet loaded, this job does NOT pull it in - it keeps running against the latest processed release and logs a reminder. Pulling in the new release is a deliberate, manual action via the UniProt-Diff-Load / UniProt-Secondary-Term-Load jobs.
See also: UniProt-Diff-Load, UniProt-Secondary-Term-Load, UniProt-Release-Check_d.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
set -e
# Informational only: this job always runs against the latest ALREADY-PROCESSED release # (the load tasks honor UNIPROT_RERUN_LATEST_PROCESSED=true and never auto-load a pending # release). If a newer release is pending, remind curators to load it manually - but do # NOT skip the catch-up run. UNPROCESSED_COUNT=$(psql -At -d $DBNAME -c "SELECT count(*) FROM uniprot_release WHERE upr_processed_date IS NULL")
if [ "$UNPROCESSED_COUNT" != "0" ]; then echo "NOTE: $UNPROCESSED_COUNT new UniProt release(s) pending - NOT loaded by this job." echo "Run UniProt-Diff-Load and UniProt-Secondary-Term-Load manually to pull in the new release." fi
echo "Proceeding with monthly re-run against latest processed release."

TIMESTAMP=`date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S` echo "WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE" echo "PWD=$PWD" rm -f $PWD/uniprot_load_report*.html $PWD/uniprot_context*.json $PWD/uniprot_load_report*.html.zip $PWD/uniprot_context*.json.zip export UNIPROT_OUTPUT_REPORT_FILE="$PWD/uniprot_load_report_$TIMESTAMP.html.zip" export UNIPROT_CONTEXT_FILE="$PWD/uniprot_context_$TIMESTAMP.json.zip" export NCBI_FETCH_CACHE_OUTPUT_FILE="$PWD/ncbi_refseq_api_results.json" export UNIPROT_COMMIT_CHANGES=true export UNIPROT_RERUN_LATEST_PROCESSED=true
# UNIPROT_RERUN_LATEST_PROCESSED=true makes UniProtLoadTask run against the latest # already-processed release and ignore any pending new release, so no shell-side skip is needed. cd $SOURCEROOT gradle uniprotLoadTask

TIMESTAMP=`date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S` echo "WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE" echo "PWD=$PWD" rm -f $PWD/uniprot_secondary_load_report.json $PWD/uniprot_secondary_load_report.json.report.html $PWD/uniprot_secondary_load_report*.json.zip $PWD/uniprot_secondary_load_report*.html.zip export UNIPROT_OUTPUT_FILE="$PWD/uniprot_secondary_load_report_$TIMESTAMP.json.zip" export UNIPROT_COMMIT_CHANGES=true export UNIPROT_RERUN_LATEST_PROCESSED=true
# UNIPROT_RERUN_LATEST_PROCESSED=true makes UniprotSecondaryTermLoadTask run against the latest # already-processed release and ignore any pending new release, so no shell-side skip is needed. cd $SOURCEROOT gradle uniprotSecondaryTermLoadTask
